creator: freebsd-bugs@boelz.eu
text: After looking into it some more I noticed that the problem is that poetry2setup doesn’t work correctly when run as root. Then, the list of packages in the generated setup.py file only contains the `synapse` package. If I build the package as user all files/python packages are there. So maybe this is a bug in devel/py-poetry2setup and not net-im/py-matrix-synapse.
